---
title: "Resources"
---

This page collects supplementary resources for **{{< var course.number >}}: {{< var course.title >}}**. Whether you are setting up R for the first time, transitioning from Stata, or looking for writing guidelines, you will find what you need here.

## {{< fa rocket >}} Getting Started

These resources help you set up your computing environment and get comfortable with R.

| Resource | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| {{< fa download >}} [R & RStudio Setup Guide](r-setup.qmd) | Install R, RStudio, and essential packages --- or use the cloud alternative |
| {{< fa arrows-rotate >}} [Stata-to-R Cheat Sheet](stata-to-r.qmd) | Side-by-side command translations for students transitioning from Stata |

## {{< fa book >}} Reference

These resources support your work throughout the semester.

| Resource | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| {{< fa database >}} [Datasets (regdatasets)](datasets.qmd) | Overview of the 24 curated datasets used in this course |
| {{< fa pen-ruler >}} [Writing & Style Guide](style-guide.qmd) | Formatting conventions and APA-style reporting guidelines for project reports |
| {{< fa circle-question >}} [Frequently Asked Questions](faq.qmd) | Answers to common questions about the course, software, and assignments |

## {{< fa book-open >}} Course Books

All course materials are open-access and freely available online.

| Material | Link |
|----------|------|
| {{< fa book-open >}} Lecture Notes | [{{< var books.lecture_notes >}}]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}){target="_blank"} |
| {{< fa laptop-code >}} R Lab Book | [{{< var books.r_lab_book >}}]({{< var books.r_lab_book >}}){target="_blank"} |
| {{< fa clipboard-list >}} Project Guide | [{{< var books.project_guide >}}]({{< var books.project_guide >}}){target="_blank"} |
| {{< fa database >}} regdatasets Package | [{{< var books.regdatasets >}}]({{< var books.regdatasets >}}){target="_blank"} |
